ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: 27% Caramelised Honey Cashews (Cashews, Sugar, Honey), 24% Caramelised Honey Almonds (Almonds, Sugar, Honey), 20% Caramelised Honey Hazelnuts (Hazelnuts, Sugar, Honey), 19% Caramelised Honey Pecans (Pecan Nuts, Sugar, Honey), 10% Pistachio Nut Kernels.
